headline: Bond Traders Eye Packed Week of Rate Decisions for Sell Signals
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The world’s most important central banks will potentially hand investors fresh reasons to sell government bonds this week as policymakers find themselves forced to confront the risk of a war-driven inflation shock.Most Read from BloombergThe Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash DemandSergey Brin Confronted Gavin Newsom at a Treehouse Party — Then Launched a Political WarGunman Detained, Trump Evacuated After Shooting at Press DinnerIran Offers Deal to US to Reopen Str

headline: BlackRock vs. Schwab: One Financial Dividend Is Built to Last a Generation
summary: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) and Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW) reported first quarter earnings this month, revealing two very different financial businesses with nearly identical market caps but sharply contrasting dividend stories. One is a fee-compounding asset management machine. The other is a brokerage and banking hybrid mid-recovery. Both raised their dividends. The gap in durability is ... BlackRock vs. Schwab: One Financial Dividend Is Built to Last a Generation
